name: Mexican Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken with cumin and chili powder.
2. Heat oil in a medium skillet; add chicken and cook over medium heat 3 to 4 minutes on each side until browned.
3. Add water and bouillon granules; reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through. Remove the chicken from the broth and set aside, reserving the broth in the skillet.
4. Cover and chill the chicken.
5. Bring the broth to a boil and cook until reduced to 1/4 cup. Remove from heat and let cool.
6. Strain the broth through a sieve and add it to a food processor.
7. Add avocado, cilantro, lime juice, green onions, jalapeno pepper, and garlic; process until smooth.
8. Cook fettuccine according to package directions; drain.
9. Rinse the fettuccine under cold water and drain again.
10. Combine fettuccine and half of the avocado mixture; toss well.
11. Place in the center of a serving platter. Arrange zucchini around the fettuccine-avocado mixture. Cut chilled chicken into 1/4-inch strips and arrange over the fettuccine, sprinkling with olives.
12. Spoon the remaining avocado mixture into the center of the chicken, sprinkling with chopped cilantro if desired.
(Fat: 13.1; Chol: 54.)
